summary: The cd0919ac runtime and regression-test change are contract-correct, including explicit strict-head compatibility, but the final review package is not recordable yet because the generated request, canonical verification evidence, and implementation lifecycle remain bound to the prior 5ade483c HEAD.
inspection_summary: Inspected the complete 5ade483c-to-cd0919ac delta, the changed pr-ship stale-role test, surface-aware and explicit strict policy paths, current generated request/evidence, and implementation lifecycle. Independently ran five current-HEAD contract tests covering content-surface reuse, role-specific invalidation, strict override, pr-ship recovery output, and unresolved merge-delta fail-closed behavior; all five passed.
inspection_evidence: At HEAD cd0919ac66ae0db8c1114f6d5acec30044d37d20, node --test --test-name-pattern "pr ship dry-run restores Agent Review commands from explicitly strict stale role gates|gate evidence and release risk reviews survive|merge reuse invalidates only the role|review strict HEAD CLI override|review status keeps stale review when merge delta diff cannot be resolved" test/vibepro-cli.test.js test/content-scoped-evidence-freshness.test.js passed 5/5. Generated request and verification artifacts still report 5ade483c.
inspection_inputs: node --test --test-name-pattern "pr ship dry-run restores Agent Review commands from explicitly strict stale role gates|gate evidence and release risk reviews survive|merge reuse invalidates only the role|review strict HEAD CLI override|review status keeps stale review when merge delta diff cannot be resolved" test/vibepro-cli.test.js test/content-scoped-evidence-freshness.test.js
judgment_delta: Initial concern that the CI repair merely weakened the old strict assertion -> resolved because the test now opts into strict_head through the public CLI with a mandatory rationale, then exercises the same HEAD-change stale recovery path.

Initial concern that surface-aware default or fail-closed behavior regressed -> resolved by current-HEAD tests proving unchanged gate/release surfaces survive rebase, changed role surfaces stale selectively, and unresolved legacy merge deltas stale.

Initial concern that current evidence and provenance were sufficient for a final pass -> not resolved because the review request and canonical unit/E2E evidence identify 5ade483c, and the latest implementation lifecycle is closed and also bound to 5ade483c; no cd0919ac authorization/start record is present.

Runtime code judgment is pass -> final review-package judgment is needs_changes until current-HEAD verification artifacts and an authorized cd0919ac lifecycle are generated, after which this same contract surface can be independently re-reviewed and recorded.

findings.detail: The canonical implementation review request and verification-evidence.json remain bound to 5ade483c, not frozen candidate cd0919ac. Although an independent current-HEAD 5-test subset passed, the required current-HEAD generated verification package has not been refreshed.

The latest implementation runtime_contract lifecycle (82689304-d5fc-4c14-90c8-6385422f8713) is closed and bound to 5ade483c. No authorized and started lifecycle bound to cd0919ac was found, so required separate-session provenance and lifecycle closure cannot be recorded fail-closed for this candidate.
